string 2:
Oh, hi! I got an appointment with the famous fortune teller,
the Father of Shinjuku!

He rents a corner of this cafe to do his readings. Ah... I'm
so nervous. Let's go!

I have a reservation! You're the fortune teller... the
Father of Shinjuku, right?

Indeed... Let me see what fate holds for you. Shall we start
with the young lady?

Yes, please! I'm worried about whether my dream will come
true...
Your dream... Hmm, to become a famous streamer, I see.

You have been diligently studying the world around you,
noticing anomalies. Commendable.

Amazing! I didn't say anything, but you're spot on! It's
incredible!

Your efforts are on track, so keep it up. You have the power
to achieve your dream.

But... be kind to everyone you encounter. Every being, not
just humans.
Thank you so much! All right. I feel so motivated now!
Hey, this fortune teller is amazing!

I'm heading off to take action right away! You should get
your fortune told, too!
Now, then. What do you seek to know, traveler?
{next}My future fate.
{next}I don't believe in fortune telling.
{next}Are you really human?

Oh... you possess a curious destiny. In time, you will bear
a burden unimaginably great.

Hoho! As it should be. Humans rely too much on fortune
telling. It spoils the fun of living.

I am just a simple fortune teller. Whether I am human or not
is irrelevant, no?

The truth is, I knew you would come here today. And I have a
request to make of you.

Four Digimon have wandered in from the Digital World, unable
to find their way back.

I want you to find and protect them. What do you say?
Will you take on this task?
{next}Sure.
{next}Why can't you do it?
{next}I'm a little busy...

I see you understand what it is you must do. Very good, very
good.

I wish it were that simple, but... let us say I cannot due
to various circumstances.

The fact you have not outright refused says you understand
your role, albeit reluctantly.

I will divine the locations of the lost Digimon. You must go
and protect them.

Once you find them, bring them back here. I will send them
back to the Digital World.

Now, for the next lost one... I will surely find it. Hmm...
Where could it be? Hmmmmm...
Ah! This is it...!
I have it! I see it now!

Unfortunately, this is all my fortune telling can reveal.
You will have to handle the rest.
Now, then. I leave this lost one in your care.

We still have yet to return all the lost ones. Shall I
locate the next one for you?
{next}Yes, please.
{end}Not just yet.

Your assistance is appreciated. I shall now divine the
location of the next lost one.

I am pleased to see your motivation. I shall now divine the
location of the next lost one.

Hohoho! I shall now divine the location of the next lost
one.

Too busy at the moment? Please return when you have the
time.

Finished with your task? Can you assist in locating the lost
one now?
{next}I'm ready.
{end}Sorry. I still don't have time.

I have been waiting for you. I shall now divine the location
of the next lost one.

You are still busy, are you? Very well. Please come back
when you are free.
Well? Have you made any progress locating the lost one?

It seems your task is yet unfinished. Would you like to hear
the location once more?
Yes, let me hear it.
{end}No, that won't be necessary.
I see. Then I leave this lost one in your care.

Very well. I shall divine the location of the first one.
Hmm... Where are you...? Hmmmmm...

The first lost one is under the Overbridge in Shinjuku.
It's a noisy place with lots of advertisements...

And it is both dark and bright at the same time... Could it
be a street at night? Hmm...
What is it? Can I help you with something...?
{next}...Are you lost?
{next}Are you a Digimon?
{end}Sorry. Wrong person. Goodbye.

You didn't call out to me for no reason. It seems you know
exactly what's going on.
...Aha, so you know. I figured as much.
Oh, wrong person? Fine. Goodbye.

I suppose there's no point in staying like this, then. But
let's move elsewhere first.
I'm a Digimon. I know I don't belong here.
I'm not here by choice. I'm stuck and can't get back.
{next}I've been asked to protect you.
{next}What have you been doing up until now?
{next}I take it you're lost?

So, you really do understand us Digimon! That means I can
finally go home, right?!

I've been keeping as far away from humans as possible—quiet
and out of sight.

H-Hey, stop! Don't use that word! It's seriously
embarrassing, you know!

I'll trust you and leave everything to you. Please get me
back to the Digital World!

Already found the first lost one, I see. I have sent it
back. Well done!

The next is near Shinjuku AltaVision. Someone is speaking to
them... Hmm, flirting...?!

And... I sense a nearby plant presence. Is it shaded from
the sunlight...?

Hey, cutie! Wanna plan your future at the home expo center
with me?
Oh, hello... Can I help you with something?
{next}...Lost?
{next}Are you a Digimon?
{end}Sorry. Wrong person. Goodbye.
Who are you? And how do you know that I'm lost?
Oh, my! How did you know? I'm a bit surprised.
I see. Goodbye, then.
So you already know. Yes, I'm a Digimon.

But there are too many people around. Let's move somewhere
else.

This form really does feel better. Ahh, I feel much more
relaxed!

The truth is, I can't get back. Are you someone who can help
me?
{next}I've been asked to protect you.
{next}What have you been doing up until now?
{next}Would you like to stay here or go home?

So, you really are connected to us Digimon! That means I can
finally go home, right?!

I tried going into a few shops, but I was so uneasy that I
stayed hidden most of the time.

Go home, of course! There are other Digimon here, but this
place just doesn't feel right.

Please get me back to the Digital World right away. I'm so
exhausted!
Good work. I have already sent the lost Digimon back.

Next is near the East Gate of Shinjuku Station. This calming
aroma... So familiar!
I also see wood grain... Could it be furniture...?
Coffee... It's so bitter! But it smells amazing...
What's up? Can I help you with something?
{next}...Are you lost?
{next}Are you a Digimon?
{end}Sorry. Wrong person. Goodbye.
Hello! Looks like I've been found out.

What? Wow, how did you know?! I was sure no one would
notice!
No problem! See ya!

You're amazing! Well, I guess I don't need to stay in this
form anymore.

But there are too many people around, so let's go over
there!
Ahh, it's been so long since I've been in my true form!
But... how did you know I was a Digimon?
{next}I've been asked to protect you.
{next}What have you been doing up until now?
{next}Just a hunch.

So, you're friends with Digimon, huh? Then that means you're
my friend, too!

Humans are scary, so I stayed quiet. But I did think it'd be
fun to play with the kids.

Haha! You're funny! You can't just sense a Digimon by
instinct, can you?
All right, then. I'm ready to go home. Let's go!
I can finally go back! I'm so happy!

The next one is the final lost one. Hmm... Where could it
be...? Hmmmmm...

The last one is... near the government building, perhaps?
I'm getting exhausted...

It seems to be enclosed in something. A black box, maybe?
Whew... That is all I can see.

Hmm... Is it straight down this road...? Or was it a right
turn at that last corner...?
Hmm? Can I help you with something, young one?
Do you have some business with this old-timer?
{next}Would you like me to get you home?
{next}Are you a Digimon?
{end}Sorry. Wrong person. Goodbye.

Oh, that's a kind offer! But do you know where my home
is...?

Hmm... I see. There's no point in trying to dodge the
question.
What? A case of mistaken identity? Well, then, goodbye.
You already know, don't you? Yes, I am a Digimon.
Just as I thought! This form feels the most natural to me.

Meeting you must be fate. I'm stuck here, unable to return
home. Would you help me?
{next}I've been asked to protect you.
{next}What have you been doing up until now?
{next}How do you like the human world?
So, I haven't been abandoned after all. I'm so grateful!

I spent my time sitting on park benches or going for walks.
No one ever suspected me.

This place wasn't as bad as I thought, but it's a bit too
overwhelming for me.
Now, then. Could you get me back? I'm completely exhausted.

With this, all the lost Digimon have been rescued, thanks to
you. I am truly grateful.

Now, after all you have done for me, I think it is only
right that I tell you the truth.
Do not be too shocked, now. The truth is... I am a Digimon!
{next}Well, obviously.
{next}Whoa... No way...
{next}What?! Are you serious?!

Huh? How long have you known? I thought I was doing such a
good job of hiding it...

You can stop with the sarcasm. Your monotone voice gives you
away, you know.

If you are that surprised, it is actually off-putting. Did
nothing seem odd to you?
I am AncientWisemon. My role here is now complete.

This is a token of thanks for saving my fellow Digimon.
Thank you for rescuing them.

The human world was fun, but it is time to go home. I am
sure we will meet again.

So we meet again! I am the fortune teller once known as the
"Father of Shinjuku."

Hohoho! You seem busy. Well, hardships while you are young
are worth enduring, they say.
